title: transit hotel with an automated checkin of 30 min
positive_comment: The place is quite new and good for transit, safe parking in the back, village nearby has great breakfasts
negative_comment: Calculate 30min for a complicated automated checkin

title: Clean,comforable, modern good sized room. Close proximity to motorway, fuel station and town
positive_comment: Location for the motorway. Location for petrol station over the road for fuel and food. Room was modern, very clean with a decent sized shower/toilet room. Shower gell and shampoo provided. Overall feel of the hotel was very and exceede our expectations.
negative_comment: The rear of the hotel for parking was initially rather off putting as it was basically ramshackle business premises, some large trucks etc, which gave a very poor feel to the place. We parked there and no problems incurred. No restaurant although a room and microwave provided for personal use. We used the local restaurant a few minutes drive down the road.

positive_comment: Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean
I think it's great because I was able to check in myself after 10:00 PM and get a room card. It's not a problem at all to come to the room during the night. Nice rooms and drink&food
negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Cheap and cheerful
positive_comment:
Decent accommodation for cheap.Free parking available around the property. Mind it's in a very quiet location.It's very close to most major roads , a Shell petrol station and  a food van within 
50 yards that's open til late (22:00 I'm not sure)
negative_comment: Self check in procedure could be challenging for some

title: Brilliant Thankyou!
positive_comment: Brilliant location right off the motorway, lovely size room & bathroom. Beautiful views in the morning and for us we found self check in/out very efficient.
negative_comment: No lock on the inside of the bedroom door, which can be a problem if traveling with small children as was worried my toddler would let himself out!

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

title: Perfection
positive_comment: It is perfection in every detail. Next to the high way, spacious parking, fast self check in, very nice lobby, very very nice rooms and beds, super nice bathroom...
negative_comment: No complaint at all

positive_comment: The hotel has a great location, just a short walk from the main square. There’s a public parking area nearby, and it’s free for hotel guests. The rooms were clean and nicely decorated, and the staff were friendly. Breakfast was good. The only thing I missed a little was a kettle in the room. It was mentioned in the description, so it’s not a complaint—just a small suggestion.
Clean and spacious room. Good location close to center and parking lot.
negative_comment: Just a bit noisy floor in the room.

positive_comment: Very comfortable and spotless clean room, very helpful staff, great breakfast, phantastic location, easily accessible.

Very nice and cosy hotel in the center. 
Friendly and helpful service, delicious breakfast. 
There is space for ski equipment. Lift to the mountain is within 200 metres.
Car parking is also available within 200 meters (you can stop in front if the hotel for check in and check out).

Our third time here, super friendly staff. Rooms are spacious and comfortable, big double beds. Hotel is on main road, 2 mins from cable car, own ski storage room...provided there is snow. Parking close by. 15 min walk to train station.
negative_comment: The one item that would be welcome, is a hot-water boiler/kettle- for tea.

title: Book this hotel  with no hesitation!
positive_comment: Everything was great. Room was much bigger than we expected, exceptionally clean, hotel perfectly located - on the main street, few minutes from sops and restaurants. Owner is very pleasant, she gave us many useful tips. Breakfast was carefully selected, tasty and plentiful. All in all, hotel highly recommended.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Sehr freundliche Chefin,liebes Personal, Frühstück nicht zu überladen und Zimmer wunderschön!!!!!! Super Lage, Parkplatz,Bergbahn,Basilika und Hauptplatz zu Fuß in wenigen Minuten erreichbar.

title: Vissza fogunk jönni!
positive_comment: Nagyon kedves, rugalmas  személyzet, isteni reggeli, (a házi lekvár mennyei), a szoba kifogástalan tiszta, kényelmes ágy, mindenben segítőkészek. A felvonó kb 80m-re van a szállástól, a fűtött sítároló is nagyon hasznos. Csak ajánlani tudjuk.
negative_comment: Talán a wifi nem volt elég jó, de csak egyszer próbáltuk.

positive_comment: Ranajky boli vyborne, dalo sa vybrat, velmi prijemná a mila hostitelka, komunikativna , vzdy poradila.
negative_comment: Všetko bolo dobre, urcite sa este vrátime.

title: Empfehlenswert
positive_comment: Alles war super außer Kissen, für mich bisschen zu hart, sonst alles gut
negative_comment: Kissen bisschen zu hart

title: Urcite odporúčam. Všetko bolo super.
positive_comment: Veľmi dobré ubytovanie, čisto, skvele ranajky, výborná poloha, úžasný personál. Pokazilo sa nám auto a ochotne pomohli, poradili. Odporúčam.

Diseño sencillo pero moderno. Extremadamente limpio y cómodo. Definitivamente no es una ubicación para quedarse varios días de vacaciones, pero perfecto para pasar una noche si estás de paso con el coche.
negative_comment: Hice una reserva para varias habitaciones individuales y obtener todas las tarjetas en la máquina de la entrada para acceder a las habitaciones con una sola reserva fué un poco complicado, aunque todo se solucionó muy rápidamente llamando al número de teléfono que facilitaban en caso de problemas. La atención fué excelente.

title: Struttura fantastica!
positive_comment: La struttura è nuovissima e molto accogliente; subito all’uscita dell’autostrada, è comodissima per chi arriva in auto come noi. Le camere sono ampie e moderne con letti comodissimi. Una nota di merito al personale: siamo arrivati alle 23 e abbiamo avuto problemi con il self check in, assolutamente non causati dalla struttura, e la persona che ci ha soccorso è stata gentilissima e ha risolto velocemente il problema permettendoci di andare in camera. Solo questo vale 1000. Se torneremo in zona, ci ricorderemo sicuramente del posto. Super consigliato!

title: Leider nur eine Nacht auf der Durchreise
positive_comment:
Der online Check-in funktionierte reibungslos. Der Check-in Automat am Eingangsbereich war mehrsprachig und einfach zu bedienen. 
Die Zimmer waren sehr sauer und einladend. 

Im Eingangsbereich gab es Automaten mit Sandwiches, Getränken und Snacks. 

Lage sehr gut mit Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, Restaurants und Nahe der Autobahn.

 Gerne wieder. Sehr zu empfehlen!

title: Perfekte Unterkunft für Zwischenübernachtung
positive_comment:
Super Anbindung. Zimmer sind ausserordentlich sauber und hat unsere Erwartung übertroffen.
Perfekt für eine Zwischenübernachtung. Einfacher Self-Checkin (noch einfacher, wenn man sich vorher registriert).
Gut durchdachtes Hotelkonzept.
Alles in der Nähe, was man braucht. 
Tipp fürs Frühstück: Taverne, die sich nicht weit vom Hotel befindet. Super nette Bedienung und sehr leckeres Frühstück.

title: Ziemlich perfekt für Durchreise mit Auto. Ladestation direkt beim Hotel.
positive_comment: Super praktisch. Alles automatisiert. Schöner Kaffeeraum für morgens. Super gelegen (kurz nach Autobahnabfahrt Trieben), also perfekt für Durchreisende. Bonus für Elektrofahrzeuge: Teslay Supercharger sowie via ENBW direkt beim Hotel !!

title: Immer wieder gerne
positive_comment: Gute Lage, sauber und für eine Nacht unkompliziert und gut
negative_comment: Scanner des Automaten, funktionierte nicht

title: Bin sehr zufrieden,komme wieder!
positive_comment: Super Lage,sehr sauber und bequem.Ideal für Durchreise.

Das Hotel hat eine gute Verkehrsanbindung zum Zentrum 
Sehr gutes Frühstück und freundliches ,hilfsbereiten Personal
Sehr sauber, war auch jemand vor Ort falls man Hilfe brauchte, Self Check in hat super funktioniert, Ausstattung modern und zweckmäßig, Automaten vor Ort mit Getränken und Snacks

title: Praktische, saubere Unterkunft

positive_comment:
Alles war fantastisch!
Wir kommen bestimmt wieder!

title: Rundum perfekt!

positive_comment: Alles perfekt die negativen Rezensionen kann ich überhaupt nicht nachvollziehen.  Einziges Problem  die schlechte telefonische Erreichbarkeit.  Antwort per Mail kam aber promt.
Schönes Zimmer, Chefin(?) und Personal sehr hilfsbereit. Liegt fast im Zentrum, Seilbahn und Parkplatz sind auch gleich uns Eck. Das Zimmer war weit größer als angegeben (18m2); eher Richtung 30m2

positive_comment: Ranajky boli vyborne, dalo sa vybrat, velmi prijemná a mila hostitelka, komunikativna , vzdy poradila.
negative_comment: Všetko bolo dobre, urcite sa este vrátime.

title: transit hotel with an automated checkin of 30 min
positive_comment: The place is quite new and good for transit, safe parking in the back, village nearby has great breakfasts
negative_comment: Calculate 30min for a complicated automated checkin

title: Clean,comforable, modern good sized room. Close proximity to motorway, fuel station and town
positive_comment: Location for the motorway. Location for petrol station over the road for fuel and food. Room was modern, very clean with a decent sized shower/toilet room. Shower gell and shampoo provided. Overall feel of the hotel was very and exceede our expectations.
negative_comment: The rear of the hotel for parking was initially rather off putting as it was basically ramshackle business premises, some large trucks etc, which gave a very poor feel to the place. We parked there and no problems incurred. No restaurant although a room and microwave provided for personal use. We used the local restaurant a few minutes drive down the road.

positive_comment: Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean
I think it's great because I was able to check in myself after 10:00 PM and get a room card. It's not a problem at all to come to the room during the night. Nice rooms and drink&food
negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Cheap and cheerful
positive_comment:
Decent accommodation for cheap.Free parking available around the property. Mind it's in a very quiet location.It's very close to most major roads , a Shell petrol station and  a food van within 
50 yards that's open til late (22:00 I'm not sure)
negative_comment: Self check in procedure could be challenging for some

title: Brilliant Thankyou!
positive_comment: Brilliant location right off the motorway, lovely size room & bathroom. Beautiful views in the morning and for us we found self check in/out very efficient.
negative_comment: No lock on the inside of the bedroom door, which can be a problem if traveling with small children as was worried my toddler would let himself out!

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

title: Perfection
positive_comment: It is perfection in every detail. Next to the high way, spacious parking, fast self check in, very nice lobby, very very nice rooms and beds, super nice bathroom...
negative_comment: No complaint at all

positive_comment: The hotel has a great location, just a short walk from the main square. There’s a public parking area nearby, and it’s free for hotel guests. The rooms were clean and nicely decorated, and the staff were friendly. Breakfast was good. The only thing I missed a little was a kettle in the room. It was mentioned in the description, so it’s not a complaint—just a small suggestion.
Clean and spacious room. Good location close to center and parking lot.
negative_comment: Just a bit noisy floor in the room.

positive_comment: Very comfortable and spotless clean room, very helpful staff, great breakfast, phantastic location, easily accessible.

Very nice and cosy hotel in the center. 
Friendly and helpful service, delicious breakfast. 
There is space for ski equipment. Lift to the mountain is within 200 metres.
Car parking is also available within 200 meters (you can stop in front if the hotel for check in and check out).

Our third time here, super friendly staff. Rooms are spacious and comfortable, big double beds. Hotel is on main road, 2 mins from cable car, own ski storage room...provided there is snow. Parking close by. 15 min walk to train station.
negative_comment: The one item that would be welcome, is a hot-water boiler/kettle- for tea.

title: Book this hotel  with no hesitation!
positive_comment: Everything was great. Room was much bigger than we expected, exceptionally clean, hotel perfectly located - on the main street, few minutes from sops and restaurants. Owner is very pleasant, she gave us many useful tips. Breakfast was carefully selected, tasty and plentiful. All in all, hotel highly recommended.
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Sehr freundliche Chefin,liebes Personal, Frühstück nicht zu überladen und Zimmer wunderschön!!!!!! Super Lage, Parkplatz,Bergbahn,Basilika und Hauptplatz zu Fuß in wenigen Minuten erreichbar.

positive_comment: Hotel was clean , rooms are big  and food was very good.
negative_comment: Hotel is 3 stars not 4 at advertised . Bed is little bit uncomfortable and some waitresses are little annoying with offering drinks every 5 minutes at dinner .

title: Enjoyable stay
positive_comment: The breakfast was excellent and the personal service of a family hotel was nice. The room was large, had nice views, with an alcove granting privacy for our daughter. The stay included a pass to lifts which was nice. We checked in later than planned or allowed, which wasn't a problem for them. Good customer service.

title: Relaxing
positive_comment: Friendly staff, good noise insulation, quiet surroundings, very nice breakfast buffet,….

title: We enjoyed a very nice winter week in hotel Sonneschupfer
positive_comment: Nice location, clean rooms, sauna, bus to Schmadling, delicious breakfast, friendly staff, dinner with local specialties
negative_comment: All was good !

title: Perfect place to stay
positive_comment: Very nice hotel.Good breakfast.Very nice location.We had perfect stay.
negative_comment: Maybe it be nice to have an indor pool.

title: Perfect choice if you want to ski in Schladming
positive_comment: The staff was extremely nice, friendly and helpful. The breakfast had perfectly adequate selection and the dinner was 3 courses optional with very delicious meals. The location of the hotel is perfect. The skibus stops just in front of the hotel. The sauna has a window looking on the mountains.
negative_comment: A hanger would be good for the small towel not above the hairdryer.

positive_comment: Super friendly staff and very good breakfast and dinner! Also the sauna after a skiing day made our day even better!
Room -good , Breakfast - good, Dinner good for Austrian conditions:)
negative_comment: For this price I expected some better food but according that we are in Austria it wasn't bad:)

title: Beautiful apartment with great views
positive_comment: Beautiful apartment with incredible views of Schladming. The pool and spa area were great for relaxing after a day on the slopes skiing. The gym, was a nice addition and free yoga classes are a bonus.
negative_comment: It is very minor but there were no teas, coffees, sugar or salt in the apartment. Also perhaps some shower gels and shampoos in the bathrooms would be good to have.

title: Spatious, nicely decorated, with great view apartments
positive_comment: A vey nice location, with cozy apartments, having very beautiful views (regardless of the position/the apartment, the views are great). Apartments are spacious, nicely decorated.
negative_comment: Not that this was the fault of the property, but I had a “neighbor” that was throwing parties with pretty loud music almost everyday.

positive_comment: The stay was very successful—we were a larger group and everyone returned satisfied. There was a beautiful view from the windows and the pool. The pool was pleasant; the only downside was the doors opening to the outside, which made it cool while swimming. An extra star for the staff—we forgot a few items in the room, and they were sent back to us without any problems and very quickly.
Very nice facilities and rooms, furniture, spacious living area and loft, terrace, everything you need both inside the apartment as well as in the building (SPA, parking places, ski rooms.
negative_comment:
The heating did not manage to make a temperature above 20 degrees C, mainly in the large living area and the bedroom with 2 exterior walls. For some people
 it is a downside.

positive_comment: Superb views, large spaces, modern apartment, very nice rooms, very comfortable stay.
negative_comment: We were woken up two nights around 1:30 by people ringing the bell outside the house. There is no clear description at the entrance which buttond belongs to which apartment,  so when you arrive home drunk, it's natural that drunk people push all the buttons.

title: The apartment was clean, beautiful and on a really nice location. We had all of the amenities in the apartment and we re
positive_comment: The apartment was beautiful, clean and on a really nice location.

The apartment was very beautiful, spacious, and clean, with a well-equipped kitchen.
We received everything we needed for our baby, which made our stay very comfortable.
The place is quiet and pleasant, with a nice pool.
We really enjoyed our stay, and the big advantage is the Schladming card – giving access to many attractions in the area.
Highly recommended!
negative_comment: The pool was a little coold

positive_comment: The lady at the reception was so nice and organized at her work 🙂
Standard of the room - high level . . Rest was perfect !
negative_comment: Mattress was to soft for me

title: Very comfortable appartment for a good price. Not too from the center (5 min drive)
positive_comment:
The appartement is very comfortable. Spacious,  well equipped kitchen, comfortable beds etc. Easy checkin/checkout process and friendly staff.
Wellness area was appreciated.

title: Muy muy bueno
positive_comment: Queda retirado pero vale la pena por la calidad y las vistas, la comida Excelente y ni hablar de la atención, gente muy atenta y amable
negative_comment: El piso del cuarto un poco sucio. Se corta toda la luz hasta en enchufes al retirar la tarjeta, por lo que me complico cargar dispositivos mientras estaba en el desayuno

negative_comment: Etwas abgelegen.

title: für mich sehr gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, sehr gerne wieder
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal, sehr sauber, beste ruhige Lage, alles zeitnah erreichbar, Essen gehobene Küche, mega lecker

title: Schönes Hotel mit leckerem Essen
positive_comment: Schöne große helle Zimmer. Sehr freundliches Personal. Tolles Frühstücksbuffet, da ist für jeden etwas dabei und auch super leckeres Abendessen. Wir waren rundum zufrieden und kommen gerne wieder.
Außergewöhnlich gutes Abendessen. Sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Hotelpersonal. Mann fühlt sich ab der ersten Minute willkommen.
Tolle Lage, sehr saubere Unterkunft, freundliche Mitarbeiter, tolles Essen

title: Absolut tolles & empfehlenswertes Hotel!!!
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Preis/ Leistungsverhältnis! Im Ganzen Haus fühlt man sich wohl und es ist alles sehr sauber! Hervorragendes Frühstücksbuffet und schmackhafte Auswahl zum Abendessen! Gemütliche- große Zimmer und das Beste sind die freundlichen Mitarbeiter! Gute und ausreichende Parkmöglichkeiten. Schibus bleibt vor dem Hotel stehen.
negative_comment: Keine Kritik sondern eine Info- Gibt es Schneefall oder Eisregen braucht man für die kurze Zu/ Abfahrt Schneeketten(!)

title: Unkompliziert und professionell
positive_comment: Modern mit Auge fürs Detail (und Weglassen unnötiger Details) ausgestattetes Zimmer mit Bergsicht, reichhaltiges Frühstück, hervorragende Küche am Abend, unkomplizierter Umgang mit Unverträglichkeiten, freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal, besonders beim Zimmerservice, kleiner aber feiner Sauna-Bereich.
negative_comment: Ein bisschen gefehlt hat uns ein ruhiger Aufenthaltsraum zum Lesen am Vor- und Nachmittag. Der Ess-Saal mit Bergpanorama kann grundsätzlich dafür genutzt werden und eignet sich eigentlich hervorragend, wird aber sofort für die nächste Mahlzeit eingedeckt, sodass man sich etwas im Weg fühlt und die Tischfläche dann weitgehend ausgefüllt ist. (Vorschlag an Hotel-Betreiber: erst direkt vor Abendessen eindecken; 1h nach Frühstück + 1h vor Abendessen zum Abräumen/Vorbereiten reservieren, sonst explizit zum Aufenthalt freigeben.)

title: Großartiges Hotel mit traumhaften Essen und top Personal
positive_comment: Großartiges Hotel mit außergewöhnlich gutem Essen und ein extrem freundliches Personal. Einfach alles top!

title: Ein Ort zum Wohlfühlen!
positive_comment:
Das familiäre Ambiente und der perönliche und herzliche Service sorgt dafür, dass man sich sofort wohl fühlt.
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist abwechsungsreich und immer frisch - ein idealer Start in den Skitag.
Das Abendessen der Halbpension ist ein Traum - schon beim Salatbuffet kann man bleiben - die Küche zaubert aber jeden Tag eine super leckere neue Kreation der regionalen Küche.
Eine kleine aber sehr schön gestaltete Sauna sorgt für die Entspannung nach dem Skitag.
Es bleiben keine Wünsche offen - und man wird auch noch herzlich und persönlich verabschiedet.

title: Lovely hotel. Fantastic staff 7⁹³
positive_comment: Lovely hotel, spotlessly clean and fantastic friendly staff.
negative_comment: Location a bit too far from the town but great ski bus service.

title: Absolute Empfehlung!
positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hat uns bei allem geholfen. Das Essen – Frühstück, Abendessen und Drinks – war sehr gut. Alles war sauber und gepflegt, die Lage top. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

title: On reviendra ❤️
positive_comment: L’emplacement impeccable, petit déjeuner copieux, personnelles serviables, propreté irréprochable.

title: Très agréable mais cher!
positive_comment:
Chambre simple et spacieuse. La propreté de la chambre et le petit déjeuner buffet bien garni et varié. Le personnel est chaleureux et disponible. La vie de notre chambre était très agréable depuis le balcon ! 
Le sauna, très appréciable après une journée de ski!
negative_comment: Le prix excessif de la nuitée.

title: Nous avons passé un Super séjour
positive_comment: Il y en avait pour tout les gouts et a volonté. Petit déjeuner copieux et diner très bon et très divers

Personnel particulièrement compétant,  attentionné et souriant.
Propreté. 
Bonne cuisine

title: Détente au milieu des montagnes
positive_comment: Une chambre très agréable, excellente literie, salle de bain fonctionnelle. Excellent petit déjeuner. Plats très variés pour le dîner et d’une grande qualité. De plus, un personnel super gentil et sympathique.
negative_comment: Tout était ok. Ne changez rien.

Wir hatten ein großes Appartment mit einem wundervollen Blick über Schladming und die Berge! Der Wellness-Bereich ist sehr schön und das morgendliche Pilates und Yoga mit Christina vor der traumhaften Kulisse war ein absolutes Highlight! ☀️ Es hat uns rundum sehr gut gefallen!
negative_comment: Die App, die man für alle Services und Buchungen nutzen sollte, haben wir nicht finden können. Es gab auch keinen Link zum Download, nur ein Verweis auf die Infomail.

title: Wir waren sehr zufrieden und kommen gern wieder.
positive_comment: Besonders haben wir uns über die Freundlichkeit des Personals in der Rezeption gefreut.Unser Sohn hatte sowohl seine Kopfhörer im Fitnessbereich als auch seine Abfahrtsstiefel im Skiraum liegengelassen.Beides ist uns unkompliziert an die Heimatadresse nachgesendet worden.Vielen Dank!
negative_comment: In der Küch wären zusätzliche Steckdosen vorteihaft.

title: Sehr gut erholt
positive_comment: Toller Blick, sehr gute Ausstattung (Skirraum, Wellness), Brötchenservice

title: Super für einen Aufenthalt mit Freunden oder Familie.
positive_comment: Der Ausblick und das Personal waren super. Man kann zu Fuß in den Ort. Unkomplizierter Check In und Out.
negative_comment: Uns hat das Waschbecken im 2. WC gefehlt und ein paar mehr Haken für z.B. Bademäntel, Handtücher in den Schlafzimmern. Und gern noch ein Whirlpool im Sparbereich. Ihr habt so eine schöne Terrasse.

title: War ein geniales Wochenende!
positive_comment: Durch und durch eine tolle Unterkunft, wir kommen wieder!
Sehr schönes Apartment in sehr schöner Lage. Tolles Spa. Skibushaltestelle vor der Tür. Aussicht.
negative_comment: Spa und Pool schliessen schon um 20:00 .. dürfte gerne länger offen sein. Relativ früher Checkout (10:00).

title: Sehr modernes und schönes Apartment
positive_comment: Die Lage ist am vis a vis Hang von der Planai, dh zu Fuß ein bisschen länger zur Innenstadt. Es fährt ein Skibus direkt von der Unterkunft weg. Das Apartment war riesig und sehr gut ausgestattet, wir fühlten uns sehr wohl. Mega Ausblick auf Schladming. Der Wellnessbereich war klein aber uns hat es an nichts gefehlt. Wir können die Unterkunft wärmstens weiter empfehlen.

title: Modern und Preiswert wohnen
positive_comment: Modernes, vollausgestattetes Apartment mit einem großartigen Ausblick auf Schladming

title: Super coole Apartments zentral gelegen. Tolle Balkone mit Blick auf den schladminger Zielhang!
positive_comment: Lage, große Apartments, komfortabel, stylish - wirklich super schöne Unterkunft! Auch genügend Parkplätze und ein Ski-Raum sind vorhanden und praktisch.
negative_comment:
Wellness und Fitness (nur Yoga Matten) sind nicht so besonders, Sauna war sehr klein und daher komplett überfüllt. 
Für das Service sollte man eine App nutzen - ist doch eher umständlich sich für ein paar Nächte extra eine App herunterzuladen. Handtücher für die Sauna und genügend Klopapier hätte ich gerne so im Apartment vorgefunden.

title: Sehr empfehlenswert!
positive_comment:
Parkplatz vor der Tür inklusive. 
Zusatzangebote (Frühstückskisterl etc.), Pool, Sauna und Dampfbad inklusive und Ausstattung waren bemerkenswert.

The stay included a pass to lifts which was nice. We checked in later than planned or allowed, which wasn't a problem for them. Good customer service.

title: Relaxing
positive_comment: Friendly staff, good noise insulation, quiet surroundings, very nice breakfast buffet,….

title: We enjoyed a very nice winter week in hotel Sonneschupfer
positive_comment: Nice location, clean rooms, sauna, bus to Schmadling, delicious breakfast, friendly staff, dinner with local specialties
negative_comment: All was good !

title: Perfect place to stay
positive_comment: Very nice hotel.Good breakfast.Very nice location.We had perfect stay.
negative_comment: Maybe it be nice to have an indor pool.

title: Perfect choice if you want to ski in Schladming
positive_comment: The staff was extremely nice, friendly and helpful. The breakfast had perfectly adequate selection and the dinner was 3 courses optional with very delicious meals. The location of the hotel is perfect. The skibus stops just in front of the hotel. The sauna has a window looking on the mountains.
negative_comment: A hanger would be good for the small towel not above the hairdryer.

positive_comment: Super friendly staff and very good breakfast and dinner! Also the sauna after a skiing day made our day even better!
Room -good , Breakfast - good, Dinner good for Austrian conditions:)
negative_comment: For this price I expected some better food but according that we are in Austria it wasn't bad:)

title: Very comfortable appartment for a good price. Not too from the center (5 min drive)
positive_comment:
The appartement is very comfortable. Spacious,  well equipped kitchen, comfortable beds etc. Easy checkin/checkout process and friendly staff.
Wellness area was appreciated.

title: Lovely hotel. Fantastic staff 7⁹³
positive_comment: Lovely hotel, spotlessly clean and fantastic friendly staff.
negative_comment: Location a bit too far from the town but great ski bus service.

title: We stayed at the hotel for a week just to ski in the area and it was perfect. Great
positive_comment: Great ambiance, vast variety of food and helpful staff.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Good vacation
positive_comment: Hotel was clean , rooms are big  and food was very good.
negative_comment: Hotel is 3 stars not 4 at advertised . Bed is little bit uncomfortable and some waitresses are little annoying with offering drinks every 5 minutes at dinner .

positive_comment:
la vue sur les montagnes est extraordinaire!!
la piscine très propre .
Nous n'avons pas utilisé le Hammam.

title: Beautiful apartment with great views
positive_comment: Beautiful apartment with incredible views of Schladming. The pool and spa area were great for relaxing after a day on the slopes skiing. The gym, was a nice addition and free yoga classes are a bonus.
negative_comment: It is very minor but there were no teas, coffees, sugar or salt in the apartment. Also perhaps some shower gels and shampoos in the bathrooms would be good to have.

title: Spatious, nicely decorated, with great view apartments
positive_comment: A vey nice location, with cozy apartments, having very beautiful views (regardless of the position/the apartment, the views are great). Apartments are spacious, nicely decorated.
negative_comment: Not that this was the fault of the property, but I had a “neighbor” that was throwing parties with pretty loud music almost everyday.

positive_comment: The stay was very successful—we were a larger group and everyone returned satisfied. There was a beautiful view from the windows and the pool. The pool was pleasant; the only downside was the doors opening to the outside, which made it cool while swimming. An extra star for the staff—we forgot a few items in the room, and they were sent back to us without any problems and very quickly.
Very nice facilities and rooms, furniture, spacious living area and loft, terrace, everything you need both inside the apartment as well as in the building (SPA, parking places, ski rooms.
negative_comment:
The heating did not manage to make a temperature above 20 degrees C, mainly in the large living area and the bedroom with 2 exterior walls. For some people
 it is a downside.

positive_comment: Superb views, large spaces, modern apartment, very nice rooms, very comfortable stay.
negative_comment: We were woken up two nights around 1:30 by people ringing the bell outside the house. There is no clear description at the entrance which buttond belongs to which apartment,  so when you arrive home drunk, it's natural that drunk people push all the buttons.

title: The apartment was clean, beautiful and on a really nice location. We had all of the amenities in the apartment and we re
positive_comment: The apartment was beautiful, clean and on a really nice location.

The apartment was very beautiful, spacious, and clean, with a well-equipped kitchen.
We received everything we needed for our baby, which made our stay very comfortable.
The place is quiet and pleasant, with a nice pool.
We really enjoyed our stay, and the big advantage is the Schladming card – giving access to many attractions in the area.
Highly recommended!
negative_comment: The pool was a little coold

positive_comment: The lady at the reception was so nice and organized at her work 🙂

negative_comment: Mattress was to soft for me

The appartement is very comfortable. Spacious,  well equipped kitchen, comfortable beds etc. Easy checkin/checkout process and friendly staff.
Wellness area was appreciated.

I had a very pleasant stay at this place. The room was clean. Breakfast was good with a nice variety of options. The staff was friendly and helpful. The location is excellent, it is conveniently situated but still in a quiet neighborhood. Overall, a great choice for a comfortable stay.
negative_comment: The room furnishings are a bit older, which may not suit everyone’s preferences, but overall it did not affect the comfort of the stay.

positive_comment: The girl at the reception was so nice, location was great and the bed was very comortable.
negative_comment: The breakfast options are very limited and not good value for money.

title: expect friendly staff
positive_comment: very, very friendly staff, breakfast better than expected, convenient location, good size room, clean, but bath need some refurbishment

title: Very simple but comfortable and clean. Highly recommended
positive_comment: Great location in the city center, very convenient for reaching my workplace. The room and bathroom were spacious, tidy, and clean. The kitchenette was very practical, fully equipped with everything needed, allowing for heating food and preparing breakfast. The lady at the reception was very kind and efficient. I will definitely consider staying here again.

title: Staying in a beautiful and vivid city like Graz - House Mobene is exact the right place to gain new
positive_comment:
The breakfast service was full satisfying.
Was personally asked about my wishes.
I felt very much at ease during the whole breakfast.
I loved the classical style of the house....
and especially the calm environment.
So you really relax over night.
Great location, good price and allowed us early check in. The room was really big.
negative_comment: Not so much a dislike but for some it may be a cool querk with the hotel being a refurbished hospital.

positive_comment:
Excellent, stuff is amazing 
Everything is clean and well kept
The location is excellent. A few minutes walk from all sights. The staff is very friendly. Safe Parking is nearby.

title: Great bargain, location, and room amenities. Clean and functional.
positive_comment: Very spacious room. It was a great bargain with kitchenette, some appliances, dishes and balcony. Great for extended stay. Facility was very clean and staff was wonderful. It was in a very convenient location to walk around the city. It was nice that the room looks out to a soccer field on one side so it does not seem busy or densely populated around. Quiet and comfortable. Everything was functional and met or exceeded my expectations. I would stay here again.
negative_comment: The bathroom was interesting. The shower had more to be desired in terms of pressure and time to warm up and needed the wand replaced. It literally is an extended stay hospital room, so the artifacts of that environment are present. If you want an art deco or elegant stay this probably isn't the place for you.  There are still some clinics operating at a lower level during the day, perhaps for office visits but none of this was disturbing.

positive_comment: My room was spacious with small kitchen. Very easy late check in with very clear instructions. Very quiet street but close to city center. Staff was extremely helpful
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Exceptional!
positive_comment:
Absolutely wonderful! Excellent location in the city centre - just next to Kunsthaus, near Hauptplatz, near Schlossberg, not far from railway station, next to tram stop. 
Amazing breakfast! So rich, anything you can imagine - they offer it.
Very kind staff - especially elderly receptionist and waitress with Eastern European accent.
Spacious rooms, very tidy and clean. Practically equipped.
At booking.com I read about noise from the street, so I asked for room directed to inner court and everything was fine.
To sum up, I was so satisfied here! I will surely recommend this hotel to my colleagues.
negative_comment: I used to come to breakfast between 7:00 - 7:30. Once I came at 8:00, some food was ran out and was not refilled.

title: A hotel with fantastic staff
positive_comment: A three star hotel with 6 star staff. Clean, nice, and excellent breakfast

title: I really liked Graz. a very nice city.
positive_comment: A lovely unspoilt hotel with a very friendly lady on reception. Lovely city and hotel is close to the River Mur where a series of bridges link to the old city and park.
negative_comment: Sadly, on the morning of my departure I had a problem with the fixture which converts from bath to shower waterflow. I had just take part in the local Graz parkrun so a shower would have been nice instead of climbing in and out of a bath with aching limbs. These things happen

positive_comment: The staff was absolutely wonderful and my only regret was that I didn't get to know their names so I could thank them personally.
negative_comment: The showers could use a renovation - bigger showers with new tile grout and silicone caulk, but everything else was great.

title: We loved our stay at the charming Hotel Mariahilf. The staff really enhanced our stay in Graz by how friendly and helpfu
positive_comment: The hotel Mariahilf exceeded our expectations. The staff were delightful. So professional and so friendly. The location was perfect. The rooms were very clean and tidy and the breakfast was delicious
negative_comment: The floors were a little bit creaky but we were happy to look past that as the building was built in the 1600’s!

positive_comment: Great hotel on great location. Very nice, quiet and clean rooms. Great breakfast. Staff is perfect! Great value for money. For sure I will back at this hotel again.

title: Good stay in Graz
positive_comment: Very good location, almost in the centre of the Graz. Close to the main attractions as Main Square or Castle.
negative_comment: Nothing particular. In room was no kettel and fridge, but it is not necessary. Maybe the wardrobe in my room was old, but I saw in others that was the new one for example.

title: Acceptable
positive_comment: Amazing location, good breakfast and friendly staff.
negative_comment: Everything was very basic. The room feels like a room from a university dormitory.

title: A fine bit old fashioned cozy hotel close to the city center and the remarkable museum of contemporary art.
positive_comment: Well located. Friendly reception. Clean an confortable
negative_comment: No real remarks

positive_comment: I Have frequently stayed at this hotel, very clean, good breakfast friendly staff great location.
negative_comment: Can be a little noisy at night depending on the room but does not stop us choosing this hotel.

title: Buena relación calidad/precio cerca del centro
positive_comment: La habitación era como un mini apartamento con cocina, era muy tranquila y silenciosa y el baño era muy amplio. Estaba muy cerca del centro.
negative_comment: Toda la zona alrededor del hotel era azul de pago con una estancia de solo dos horas. Había a 10 minutos una zona de parking de larga estancia, también de pago, pero más económico.

title: Habitación sencilla, con una buena relación calidad precio en GRAZ
positive_comment: Habitaciones amplias, en un lugar tranquilo y bien conectado. El personal era muy atento y dispuesto a proporcionar información y solucionar cualquier problema que tuvieras durante la estancia. Desayuno sencillo pero bueno.
negative_comment: El colchón no era muy bueno ni tampoco las almohadas, aunque permitían descansar.

title: Hotel tranquilo, sencillo y con buena atención
positive_comment: La buena disposición del personal para ayudarnos proporcionando información, adaptando el horario de desayuno, solicitando taxis, permitiendo salir una hora más tarde, etc. El desayuno fue variado. Las habitaciones tranquilas y limpias.
negative_comment: Todo bien, excepto que hizo calor y la habitación no dispone de aire acondicionado.

positive_comment: Buen tamaño de habitación. Muy limpio todo. Personal habla bien inglés.
negative_comment: Baño con olor a desagüe. Faltó aire acondicionado.

positive_comment: I had a very pleasant stay at this place. The room was clean. Breakfast was good with a nice variety of options. The staff was friendly and helpful. The location is excellent, it is conveniently situated but still in a quiet neighborhood. Overall, a great choice for a comfortable stay.

positive_comment: Ottima posizione, servizi molto buoni, eccellente pulizia. Ha rispecchiato perfettamente le aspettative.  L' angolo cottura è molto comodo e ben attrezzato. Il garage coperto è vicino ed è comodo per lasciarvi l' auto viste anche le temperature rigide (-6°, -9°) potendo comodamente recarci a piedi in centro e girarlo vista la distanza come da descrizione. Zona molto tranquilla.
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Ottimo
positive_comment: Lo staff è stato molto accogliente e disponibile per ogni nostra richiesta. Posizione molto buona per andare in centro, sia a piedi che con i mezzi pubblici.
negative_comment: Nella finestra della camera 446 manca una tenda alla finestra, così di mattina il sole penetra presto.

title: Haus Mobene. Hotel buono e tranquillo  a 10 minuti a piedi dal centro.
positive_comment: Cordialita' e disponibilita' dello staff, la pulizia e la dimensione generosa della stanza e la tranquillita' della zona dove e' ubicato l'hotel.
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare.

title:
Buona posi
zione
positive_comment: Stanza pulita, abbastanza grande con balconcino, bagno senza bidet, posizione buona con centro raggiungibile a piedi, c'è un piccolo cucinino, colazione buona, parcheggio privato buono ma costa 20 euro

title: Ottimo
positive_comment: La posizione, le camere ed il bagno molto puliti,lo staff e la colazione
negative_comment: Niente

positive_comment: Ottima la posizione. Stanza semplice e pulita, veramente comodo l'angolo cottura con bollitore e microonde. È il mio secondo soggiorno e non sarà l'ultimo.

Posizione ottimale, molto vicina al centro e ai mezzi pubblici. Il fatto di avere una piccola cucina in camera regala grande autonomia. La stanza era semplice ma spaziosa e non mancava nulla. Ampio bagno.
Hotel vicino al centro, la camera è spaziosa, vi è anche un piccolo angolo cottura.
negative_comment: L'arredamento è un po' datato e vi sono alcune cose rotte, una lampada ad esempio era staccata dal tetto. Per raffreddare la stanza vi è solo un ventilatore.

title: Haus Mobene. Buona struttura non lontana dal centro.
positive_comment: La tranquillita' della struttura, il personale simpatico ed accogliente, le dimensioni e la pulizia della camera, la possibilita' di scaldare del cibo col microonde a disposizione e la presenza di un minibar per tenere le bibite al fresco.
negative_comment: La mancanza dell'aria condizionata anche se fortunatamente c'era un ventilatore e purificatore d'aria di ottima qualita' e marca che nonostante il caldo ci ha consentito di dormire bene.

positive_comment: Stanza pulita ed accogliente con opportunità di scaldare e consumare pasti nell'ampia stanza. Letti comodi e zona silenziosa nel centro di Graz. Personale gentile e disponibile. Piccolo spazio esterno molto gradevole. Siamo stati molto, molto bene.
negative_comment: Non poter differenziare i rifiuti.

positive_comment: Für mich war die Lage perfekt. Sehr freundliche Mittarbeiterinnen, Schlüssel Übergabe super funktioniert. Frühstück sehr gut
negative_comment: Man muss sehr lange warten bis in der Dusche  warmes Wasser kommt, dachte schon es kommt keines. Dann war es aber super

positive_comment: Frühstück sehr gut- mitten im Zentrum -geräumige zimmer
Die Mitarbeiterin war extrem freundlich und zuvorkommend.  Frühstück für 11 Euro war sehr gut. Die Lage war sehr zentral.
Sehr saubere zweckdienliche Zimmer. Gute Lage. Nettes Personal
negative_comment: Schlüsselausfolge nicht optimal.

positive_comment:
Leicht zu finden, gute Lage in Innenstadtnähe, engagierte Mitarbeiter. 
Praktische Einrichtung mit Wasserkocher und gefüllter Minibar - war für die eine Übernachtung (leider hab ich auch kein Frühstück gebraucht) für mich allerdings nicht relevant.
negative_comment: Man hört jedes Geräusch vom Gang.

positive_comment: Eine herbstgelbe Magnolie vor dem Fenster zum Grünen gibt es  auch im 5-Stern Hotel nicht...
Sehr nettes Gästehaus für einen Wochenend Aufenthalt.Super zentrale Lage.Angemessener Preis.
negative_comment: Frühstück alles verpackt gekauft.Keine grosse Auswahl.Alles Supermarktwaren.

title: Nettes günstiges Hotel in ruhiger Gegend.
positive_comment: Sehr gute Lage.ca.10 minuten Gehzeit in die Innenstadt.Nettes Personal.Zimmer sauber.Preis-Leistung war in Ordnung.
negative_comment: Ich hatte nichts zu bemängeln.Komme gerne wieder

positive_comment:
Die Lage des Hotels ist optimal.Nur ein paar Minuten zu Fuss in die Innenstadt. 
Das Personal ist bemüht und sehr freundlich.
Gemütliches und sauberes Zimmer, sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Ruhige Lage und gutes Frühstück. Ideal für einen entspannten Aufenthalt.
Ubicación muy buena, prácticamente en el centro, con un ambiente divertido. Desayuno muy correcto y personal muy amable y agradable.

title: Muy recomendable
positive_comment: Me gustó mucho, es un hotel clásico, con decoración de buena calidad, habitación bien  amplia y cómoda. El desayuno excelente, surtido y con productos de buena calidad, el personal fue  amable. La ubicación cerca del centro y con buen transporte público  a la estación. Tiene un bar animado, con mesitas en el exterior donde se puede salir a fumar.
negative_comment:
Yo hice las observaciones en recepción:
1.- la entrada al baño tiene un peldaño de app 2 cm por lo que casi me cai. Especialmente si uno va un poco dormida en la noche.
2.- tiene persianas antiguas que no impiden la entrada de luz exterior; hay edificios al frente que tienen luz muy potente cuya claridad impide dormir.   Si no ponen celosías eléctricas, por lo menos sugiero cortinas black-out.

positive_comment: Ubicado en pleno centro para realizar turismo sin necesidad de usar transportes. Parking al lado del hotel. Zonas para cenar y tomar algo a pocos metros. Camas cómodas. Todo limpio. Desayuno variado y rico.
negative_comment: Hacia calor en las habitaciones y no había aire acondicionado ni ventilador.

title: Fantástica relación calidad-precio
positive_comment:
Muy buena ubicación
Cómoda la cama y las almohadas
Buena insonorización
Desayuno correcto
negative_comment:
La llave de la habitación era tamaño XL. Curioso que no sea tipo tarjeta
Todo correcto en general. La ducha podría ser un poco más ergonómica.

title: Brillante y acogedora.
positive_comment: El desayuno espectacular. Pero fundamentalmente el lugar donde se desayuna. Un 5 estrellas.
negative_comment: No se...realmente no encuentro ningún motivo.

title: Cumpleaños en Graz
positive_comment: Amplia habitación con vistas al Uhrturm, gran desayuno y super céntrico. Pegado a todo!
negative_comment: El baño estaba un poco viejo.

positive_comment: La ausencia de Aire acondicionado puede ser un problema
negative_comment: La falta de aire

title: Hotel muy cómodo
positive_comment: Está en el centro de la ciudad, por lo que es muy cómodo para moverte andando. Además el parking está justo al lado y te hacen un "descuento" y pagas   20€ al día. La habitación muy amplia y la cama muy cómoda.
negative_comment: Del desayuno esperábamos algo más, es normal.

positive_comment: Todo perfecto, desde la atención hasta la comodidad!
El servicio por parte Victor fue excepcional, tiene una gran ubicación y múltiples opciones para comer, además que prácticamente todo el recorrido se puede hacer a pie, si te gusta caminar.
negative_comment: Que no hubiese agua embotellada en las habitaciones, ni una mini-nevera

title: Gute Lage, super Frühstück
positive_comment:
Die Lage ist absolut perfekt für einen Kurztrip nach Graz. Alles ist zu Fuss gut erreichbar z.B. Innenstadt und Schlossberg.
Das Frühstück ist sehr gut und das gesamte Personal war ausgesprochen freundlich und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Die nicht so gute Bewertung beim Komfort liegt daran, dass die Zimmer leider keine Klimaanlage haben, daher ist es, wenn es draußen warm ist, auch im Zimmer und v.a. im Bad doch sehr warm. Und da das Hotel in einer Fussgängerzone mit vielen Lokalen liegt, ist es bei offenem Fenster auch ein wenig laut.

positive_comment:
Die Lage direkt in der Altstadt , mit Blick auf den Uhrenturm ,die Kunsthalle und die kurzen Wege zum Bahnhof und Tram , machten uns die Besichtigungen sehr leicht.Die Touristeninfo ist auch sehr gut ausgestattet und so waren Wanderungen durch die Klam und an dem wunderschönen Fluss entlang auch problemlos, obwohl wir mit der DB angereist sind.
Das Hotel ist schon sehr alt und so sollte man nicht mit neuen Leitungen im Bad rechnen.
negative_comment: Siehe oben Bad, aber das ist nebensächlich. Ich habe die Badewanne sehr genossen und wusste,dass es kein Neubau ist.

positive_comment: Die Lage ist top! Personal sehr freundlich. Frühstück war ganz gut :-)
negative_comment: Der Lärmpegel von draußen war ein Wahnsinn! Hat unsere Nachtruhe leider sehr beeinträchtigt.

title: Tolle Lage für einen kurzen City Trip
positive_comment: Sehr Zentrumsnahe, gute Parkmöglichkeit, gutes Frühstück

Sehr freundliches Personal. Reichhaltiges gutes Frühstück. Super Lage. Zimmer sehr sauber. Preisgünstig.
Es befindet sich eine super tolle Bar im Haus wo wir auch freundlichst bedient wurden.
negative_comment: Dusche veraltet.

positive_comment: Wir waren schon mehrmals im Hotel Mariahilf und kommen gerne wieder!

title: Tolles Hotel
positive_comment:
Mir hat besonders das freundliche und aufmerksame Personal gefallen. Auch das Frühstücksbuffet war ansprechend, abwechslungsreich in einem Raum mit angenehmer Atmosphäre und sehr gutem Service 

Die Lage und damit auch Anbindung an den ÖPNV und die Sehenswürdigkeiten ist sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Ich war in einem Dachgeschosszimmer untergebracht.. Das Zimmer an sich war gut, aber die eingebaute Duschkabine war extrem klein/eng (gefühlte 50 bis 60 cm Schenkellänge).

Wofür das Hotel nichts kann, ist der nächtliche Lärm, eventuell nur am Wochenende (ging bis ca 4 Uhr früh) durch "Partyszene"
Bei geöffnetem Fenster war Schlafen daher absolut unmöglich.. Bei  geschlossenem Fenster kam es zu "Hitzestau" im Zimmer, was Schlafen auch verunmöglichte bzw. nur unter starker (körperlicher) Belastung ging.. Nun war es mit ca 5 Grad Celsius Außentemperatur noch kühl. Im Sommer halte ich diese Zimmer im Dachgeschoss, da keine Klimaanlage vorhanden, für nicht funktionsgerecht. Da würde ich nach Zimmern in den beiden  unteren Etagen und eventuell nach Zimmern Richtung Innenhof, falls es diese gibt, fragen. Der Lärm war extrem auf beiden Straßen (Kosaken und Mariahilfstr.). Mir tut das für das Hotel schrecklich leid, dass dessen Eindruck unter der Einwirkung lärmender Menschen in der Nacht leidet. Das hat das Hotel nicht verdient..

title: Kurz Besuch in der Stadt
positive_comment: Wir sind gerne in dem Hotel weil das Preis Leistung Verhältnis sehr gut ist, und weil es mitten in der Stadt im Zentrum liegt.
negative_comment: Ein älteres Stadt Hotel,.. Preis Leistung super,.. Lage mitten im Zentrum

title: Ich werde wieder hier buchen, weil ich die Gegend und das Flair des Hotels liebe.
positive_comment: Der Empfang war überaus freundlich. Die Lage ist  zentral und in einer schönen Gegend. Das Zimmer war kuschelig warm, das Badezimmer sehr sauber. Der Frühstücksraum ist gemütlich, das Frühstück völlig ausreichend im Angebot. Die dazugehörende bar 8020 ist empfehlenswert!
negative_comment: Unser Zimmer lag leider über einem Pub,  vor der es lange immer wieder sehr laut war.

title: top Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis in toller Lage
positive_comment: nettes, hilfsbereites Personal, super Lage mit Blick auf das "Friendly Alien" aka Kunsthaus Graz; Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis top; Hotelbar auch empfehlenswert
negative_comment: Zimmer sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen und könnten make-over vertragen

title: Parfait pour un séjour reussi

dans un quartier sympathique. Le petit déjeuner est copieux et délicieux.les dames à la réception sont très gentilles et accueillantes.
A 10 minutes de marche du centre de Graz.

positive_comment: I had a very pleasant stay at this place. The room was clean. Breakfast was good with a nice variety of options. The staff was friendly and helpful. title: Great bargain, location, and room amenities. Clean and functional.
positive_comment: Very spacious room. It was a great bargain with kitchenette, some appliances, dishes and balcony. Great for extended stay. Facility was very clean and staff was wonderful. It was in a very convenient location to walk around the city. It was nice that the room looks out to a soccer field on one side so it does not seem busy or densely populated around. Quiet and comfortable. Everything was functional and met or exceeded my expectations. I would stay here again.
negative_comment: The bathroom was interesting. The shower had more to be desired in terms of pressure and time to warm up and needed the wand replaced. It literally is an extended stay hospital room, so the artifacts of that environment are present. If you want an art deco or elegant stay this probably isn't the place for you.  There are still some clinics operating at a lower level during the day, perhaps for office visits but none of this was disturbing.

positive_comment: My room was spacious with small kitchen. Very easy late check in with very clear instructions. Very quiet street but close to city center. Staff was extremely helpful
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Funcionários muito atenciosos, localização excelente
positive_comment:
Simpatia e eficiência dos funcionários. 
Localização muito central e cómoda.
negative_comment:
O soalho necessita de renovação (extremamente ruidoso ao andar). 
Seria conveniente instalar ar condicionado. 
As janelas deveriam ter isolamento acústico. 
A chave do quarto deveria ser por cartão ou outro método mais prático.

title: Exceptional!
positive_comment:
Absolutely wonderful! Excellent location in the city centre - just next to Kunsthaus, near Hauptplatz, near Schlossberg, not far from railway station, next to tram stop. 
Amazing breakfast! So rich, anything you can imagine - they offer it.
Very kind staff - especially elderly receptionist and waitress with Eastern European accent.
Spacious rooms, very tidy and clean. Practically equipped.
At booking.com I read about noise from the street, so I asked for room directed to inner court and everything was fine.
To sum up, I was so satisfied here! I will surely recommend this hotel to my colleagues.
negative_comment: I used to come to breakfast between 7:00 - 7:30. Once I came at 8:00, some food was ran out and was not refilled.

title: A hotel with fantastic staff
positive_comment: A three star hotel with 6 star staff. Clean, nice, and excellent breakfast

title: I really liked Graz. a very nice city.
positive_comment: A lovely unspoilt hotel with a very friendly lady on reception. Lovely city and hotel is close to the River Mur where a series of bridges link to the old city and park.
negative_comment: Sadly, on the morning of my departure I had a problem with the fixture which converts from bath to shower waterflow. I had just take part in the local Graz parkrun so a shower would have been nice instead of climbing in and out of a bath with aching limbs. These things happen

positive_comment: The staff was absolutely wonderful and my only regret was that I didn't get to know their names so I could thank them personally.
negative_comment: The showers could use a renovation - bigger showers with new tile grout and silicone caulk, but everything else was great.

title: We loved our stay at the charming Hotel Mariahilf. The staff really enhanced our stay in Graz by how friendly and helpfu
positive_comment: The hotel Mariahilf exceeded our expectations. The staff were delightful. So professional and so friendly. The location was perfect. The rooms were very clean and tidy and the breakfast was delicious
negative_comment: The floors were a little bit creaky but we were happy to look past that as the building was built in the 1600’s!

positive_comment: Great hotel on great location. Very nice, quiet and clean rooms. Great breakfast. Staff is perfect! Great value for money. For sure I will back at this hotel again.

title: Good stay in Graz

negative_comment: Nothing particular. In room was no kettel and fridge, but it is not necessary. Maybe the wardrobe in my room was old, but I saw in others that was the new one for example.

negative_comment: matelas à mémoire de forme trop souple

title: Très bel hôtel au cœur de la magnifique ville de Graz
positive_comment:
Nous avons tout aimé à commencer par l’emplacement de l’hôtel que nous n’imaginions pas si central ! La visite du centre de Graz commence dès que l’on sort de l’hôtel et tout se fait facilement à pied. Pour autant nous n’avons pas été importunés par le bruit de la rue. Les chambres sont spacieuses et les lits confortables. Le verre offert à l’arrivée est un petit plus que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. 
Le parking proposé à proximité de l’hôtel était un peu cher à notre goût et nous lui avons préféré un parking relais gratuit accessible en transport en commun (P+R Weinzödl).

La chambre était grande. L'emplacement parfait pour visiter Graz. Il n'y a eu aucun problème pour parquer la voiture dans le garage souterrain et l'hôtel avait un local pour mettre le vélo en sécurité. Le petit déjeuner était dans une jolie salle, il était copieux.
negative_comment: La chambre donnait sur une ruelle avec des bars, l'ambiance était sympa mais le bruit a duré  longtemps, impossible de dormir avec la fenêtre ouverte.

title: Hôtel confortable, petit déjeuner turque copieux, l'hôtel est proche à pied des sites d'intérêt.
positive_comment: Hôtel proche des centres d'intérêt historique.

Bel hôtel dans une rue calme du centre ville qui permet de se promener et d'apprécier la ville. Les chambres sont spacieuses avec un lit très confortable. Le petit déjeuner est très bon et très varié avec du choix dans le pain croustillant et les gateaux sont délicieux.

title: comme d'habitude, tres bien.
positive_comment: Tres bon emplacement ainsi que tres bon petit dejeuner et chambre tres propre.

title: Belle découverte d'une ville magnifique.
positive_comment: Petit déjeuner très bon et copieux. Emplacement excellent. Depuis l'hôtel tous les points remarquables sont abordables à pied .

"Excellent location in the heart of the Old Town with a stunning view. The rooms are spacious, sparkling clean, and equipped with all the necessary amenities."

title: Location, the view, the beds, everything was super. Also the hosts.
positive_comment: Location, the view, the beds, everything was super.

title: Staying in the tranquil old town of Ohrid
positive_comment: Beautiful views and quiet location. It was quick to walk down to the lake and the bazaar area. The old town was quiet at night and the villa had a very tranquil feeling. Friendly and helpful staff made me feel at home. The kitchen  area was fantastic to make hot drinks and to eat take out dishes. I would return there.
negative_comment: I was aware that the villa is located on a hill - thus the great views. Other guests might be put off a hill.

positive_comment: No breakfast included  but shared facility available
negative_comment: Loved the view from location

title: Brilliant place to stay
positive_comment:
The view from the top room was stunning. 
They had communal area which had a kitchen and seating area, which was nice area to relax having breakfast or in an evening. 
Veritsa was very helpful and accommodating throughout our stay. She was helpful with recommendations and booked us a taxi back to the airport when needed.

Everything was just fantastic, loved the view from the terrace and could see a glimpse of Lake Ochrid from the room. Room was also nicely decorated.
I loved that there was a communal kitchenette for guests. Lovely gesture.

The host was also really friendly; she has even offered to make us coffee when making herself one.
negative_comment: Cleanliness in general was perfect but I am being a bit picky there were few hair left behind after cleaning.

title: Amazing view! Great location.
positive_comment: The house is beautifully presented and spotless. Well equipped, comfortable and perfect location for quiet retreat. The owner have thought of everything. Wished I could have a time to enjoy the garden. Couldn't have wished for anything better.

title: Good location, good price, and good communication, everything needed for a stay during your travels
positive_comment: We arrived late due to a border traffic and informed the host that we are going to arrive very late.  She understood the situation and offered a great solution how we can access the room and did everything as instructed. We were able to get in the room without any problems. We thank the host for the good instructions

title: Perfect Balkan travel stop
positive_comment: The atmosphere is very relaxed and friendly and dinner was great. The room was super clean. The location close to the highway makes it a perfect overnight stay when travelling. There's plenty of parking space.
negative_comment: In the quiet season, the kitchen probably closes after all expected customers have been served, so don't rely on closing times without contacting them. Breakfast was a little chaotic, but in the end, I got everything I needed. The street is relatively quiet, but you can hear the nearby highway, so I slept with earplugs in.

title: Excellent location to relax after a long drive, very friendly hosts: Highly recomendable
positive_comment: Excellent location, near the highway but still in a beautiful natural setting; rooms were spotless and clean, very comfortable, nice breakfast and the Balkan inspired restaurent was of very high quality
negative_comment: Perhaps slightly dated bathrooms, but extremelly clean, no complaints

title: Good place to stay
positive_comment:
Good location
Comfortable bed
The shower has good pressure
Restaurant next to us
negative_comment:
- no hairdryer 
- no microwave during breakfast

title: Nice rooms and lovely host
positive_comment:
Nice rooms with good beds. Breakfast was good. Menu in restaurant was  a bit on the short side but we had the traditional schnitzel and it was very good.
Very nice and serviceminded host
negative_comment: It was located by a small road not very far from highway. We thought it would be quiet but there was a lot of traffic and since it was very hot weather we needed to open windows and it became very noicy. However, for 1 night it was just a minor thing.

positive_comment: Rooms are little older, but everything is really nice and clean. Delicious Balkan food, I totally recommend.

title: thank you for all the attention and kindness you have given us.
positive_comment:
We booked on the way and drove late at night and got a call to see if we were coming. And we arrived, thank God, it was scary to drive at night in the rain on the Austrian autobahn with constant road works. We had a large room on the 3rd floor where we had everything we needed. Soft mattresses, I finally slept 😆. A buffet is available in the morning, simple but tasty.

Sofia, thank you for all the attention and kindness you have given us.
negative_comment: And it's probably worth changing the hoses in the shower.

positive_comment: We were driving from Hallstatt to Vienna and I chose this hotel because of its convenient location. We really liked it, very comfortable, clean, with friendly staff and a delicious breakfast.
Trotz der geschlossenen Gesellschaft war der Empfang freundlich. Da wir nur eine Übernachtung auf dem Weg nach Kroatien gebucht hatten, war der Aufenthalt angenehm.

title: perfect verblijf voor op doorreis
positive_comment: Wij hebben hier geslapen op doorreis naar Bosnië en Herzegovina. En de locatie lag perfect op de route. het fijne was dat we gewoon op een normale burgelijke tijd vanuit huis konden vertrekken om nog eens op tijd in te kunnen checken. we waren eigenlijk net iets te laat om nog een biertje te bestellen maar deze werd alsnog geschonken.
negative_comment: niets

title: Perfect location, outstanding costvalue ratio.
positive_comment: Perfect. This place is in the heart of the city. The staff is very kind and helpful in every issue arisen. The rooms were modern and clean, nicely designed. It definitely well above avarage considering the costvalue ratio.
negative_comment: Maybe the door of the toilet and the bathroom, if I am forced to mention one. It was privacy glass, I do not really like it, but this can be a personal thing.

title: comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location
positive_comment: Very comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

title: Excellent
positive_comment: Everything was great. The hotel is on the nice location in the center of Graz, the staff was friendly, rooms were modern,cosy and clean..parking garage is near the hotel (100m) and everything else is near..

title: The loveliest hotel in Graz
positive_comment: This is the most charming hotel. We felt like home. It is close to literally everything and there are a couple of great restaurants and cute shops around. The parking is right in front of the hotel. Breakfast is amazing. The staff is always smiling and nice. I can’t reccomend this hotel enough. We fell in love with Graz and when we come back,we’ll stay in this hotel. Thank you for everything.
negative_comment: Everything was great

positive_comment: Habitación amplia y recién reformada, limpieza, baño muy cómodo.

title: Muy acogedor.
positive_comment:
Ubicación: muy céntrico, en el corazón de una zona con ambiente y a menos de 20m, a pie, de la Catedral y el Mausoleo.
Habitación: amplia, luminosa, impoluta y, lo mejor que puedo decir, 'acogedora'. Cuarto de ducha amplio y separado del wc, también amplio. Magnífico colchón. Tiene un pequeño minibar y el wifi se coge bien.
Desayuno: tipo buffet. Hay donde elegir. Todo lo que probe bueno.
Personal: profesional y muy atento.
Parking: abierto, enfrente de la entrada del hotel. No dispone de muchas plazas.
negative_comment: Por poner un 'pero', si hubiera tenido una hervidora en la habitación sería perfecto.

title: CORRECTO
positive_comment: Hotel situado fuera del centro histórico pero muy cercano a ello. En la calle del hotel hay mucha vida con restaurantes. El hotel y el desayuno cumplen.

title: Habitaciones modernas y muy confortables
positive_comment: El hotel y las habitaciones eran muy lindos y confortables. La decoración es muy moderna y la habitación y el baño son muy espaciosos y bien decorados. La atención del personal es muy buena. De hecho fueron muy amables ya que el estacionamiento del hotel era pago pero como estaba casi vacío no me cobraron la tarifa.
negative_comment: En realidad estoy muy conforme con todo. El único detalle es que la cama estaba formada por 2 camas individuales juntas, lo cual no es cómodo. Hubiera sido un buen gesto que dejaran una botellita de agua de cortesía.

title: Nuestra primera opción en Graz
positive_comment:
Hemos estado varias veces alojados en este hotel. Nuestra hija vive en Graz y vamos cuando podemos. La primera vez que nos alojamos ahí fue en 2017, pero después de esa fecha renovaron el hotel y superó con creces nuestras expectativas. Intentamos ir cada año y siempre es nuestra primera opción. Seguiremos alojándonos en este hotel siempre que esté disponible.
El personal es encantador y muy dispuesto a ayudar en lo que puedan. La entrada y salida, en caso de ser en horario fuera de recepción, se hace sin problema. 
Muchas gracias.
negative_comment: Nada. Todo perfecto.

positive_comment: Todo, cuando entras a un hotel y todo esta perfecto solo queda darles las gracias y la 🎊🎉Enhorabuena
negative_comment: Nada

positive_comment: Posizione centrale, hotel accogliente, camera pulita e grande
negative_comment: Colazione presa a parte 19 euro, prezzo alto per una colazione nella norma. Una stanza vicino ha tenuto la TV accesa tutta notte, un po' si sentiva.

positive_comment:
Struttura moderna, accogliente e in pieno centro di Graz ma camere estremamente silenziose.
Camere molto ampie e pulitissime con un letto grande e comodo.
I dintorni dell'hotel (zona semi pedonale) sono molto belli e tranquilli, anche la sera, con tanti locali.
Parcheggio pubblico a prezzo convenzionato nelle vicinanze.
negative_comment:
Le tende oscuranti non coprono la larghezza delle finestre e il mattino entra molta luce.
Colazione buona ma 19 euro a persona sono eccessivi.

positive_comment: Posizione centralissima,parcheggio in struttura,colazione abbondante sia salata che dolce, staff gentile e disponibile.

title: Una notte di passaggio per Vienna
positive_comment: Ottima posizione ed ottima stanza(avevamo prenotato una junior suite)
negative_comment: Peccato per la colazione per quanto riguarda la parte dolce! Avremmo mangiato volentieri un croissant ma non c'erano

title: Eccezionale rapporto qualità prezzo.
positive_comment: Camera impeccabile, pulitissima e spaziosissima con bagno in locale separato dal wc. Letto comodissimo e ottimo isolamento acustico. Colazione del tutto superiore alla media degli hotel di questa categoria. La posizione dell'albergo è ideale per visitare la città. Non essendo nel centro storico, ma adiacente allo stesso, dispone di posteggio auto ad un prezzo del tutto ragionevole. Il ristorante consigliato si è rivelato ottimo (cucina tipica) e con tariffe molto convenienti. Nei pressi c'è anche un mercato.
negative_comment: Nulla! Unico possibile suggerimento: aggiungere un bollitore nella stanza.

title: Week end a Graz
positive_comment: Hotel in centro storico, di recente ristrutturazione. Camere ampie e accoglienti. Personale disponibile e molto gentile. Parcheggio privato gratuito
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Consigliato!
positive_comment: La camera luminosa e molto spaziosa, ben arredata e con colori chiari. La posizione: il quartiere Lend è molto vivace, bei negozi e locali, praticamente in centro.
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Perfetto
positive_comment: Bella stanza, grande e confortevole. Posizione centralissima. Colazione ottima anche se poca scelta di pezzi dolci. Volendo c’è il parcheggio sotterraneo a 5 minuti a piedi a 15 euro al giorno con la tariffa dell’hotel.
negative_comment: Niente

title: Ottimo soggiorno a Graz
positive_comment: Le stanze pulite e confortevoli, personale gentile e disponibile, ottima colazione, la posizione vicinissima al centro,  il parcheggio di pertinenza della struttura.

title: Buon hotel
positive_comment: Hotel in zona centrale e comoda. Niente di cui lamentarmi
negative_comment: Tutto perfetto

positive_comment:
Lage in Zentrumnähe - sehr schöne Zimmer und auch alles sehr sauber. Kaffee aus Kaffeemaschine wurde im Foyer zur Verfügung gestellt. Dieser war auch sehr gut.
Sehr positiv habe ich empfunden, dass sich die Dame im Büro für die "Umstände" entschuldigt hat und extrem hilfsbereit war.
negative_comment: Online-Check in - dieser konnte nur dank einer sehr freundlichen Dame bewältigt werden (Tablett funktionierte nicht zu 100 %). Frühstück war in ein Partnerlokal ausgelagert und konnte nicht wie früher im Hotel konsumiert werden. Dies war uns vorher nicht bekannt. Beim Frühstück selbst, war das Personal zwar sehr freundlich - jedoch  überfordert. Angemerkt wird, dass das Lokal um 9:00 Uhr voll war. Semmeln waren aufgetaut und feucht und Wurst und Käse mussten immer wieder urgiert werden (sicher auch aufgrund der hohen Gästeanzahl geschuldet).

positive_comment:
Seit einer Woche ein Self Service Hotel. Personal ist sehr bemüht, den Check In zu begleiten
Tolle Lage am Lendplatz
Großes und sauberes Zimmer.
Frühstück im Partnerhotel (Steirer Stuben ... 100m) sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Snack- / Getränke- / Kaffeeautomaten noch nicht in Betrieb (stehen aber schon)
Parken sehr schwierig. In der nächsten öffentlichen Garage (400m) 22 Euro/ Tag.

title: Transitübernachtung im Herzen der Stadt, um in wenigen Stunden viel von der Stadt zu Fuß zu sehen
positive_comment: Komfortable, geräumige Unterkunft in perfekter Lage. Das Badezimmer ist riesig und bietet sowohl eine Badewanne als auch eine Dusche. Zwischen dem luxuriösen Waschbecken auf der einen Seite und der nahezu separaten Toilette (mit Schiebetür) auf der anderen Seite ist sehr viel Platz. Vielleicht das beste Badezimmer, das wir je in einem Hotel gesehen haben. Der Preis ist für diese Lage und diesen Komfort sehr angemessen.
negative_comment: Es gibt nicht genügend Parkplätze in der Nähe des Hotels, sodass man sein Auto in einer öffentlichen Garage abstellen muss, die nicht direkt neben dem Hotel liegt und einige enge Passagen aufweist. Der Preis pro Tag (für Hotelgäste) ist jedoch sehr akzeptabel. Das Frühstück erschien uns zu teuer, weshalb wir es im Hotel nicht eingenommen haben. Ohne diese beiden Unannehmlichkeiten hätte die Bewertung 10 betragen können.

title: Super, jederzeit wieder sehr zu empfehlen
positive_comment: Perfekte Lage, super sauberes Hotel total nettes Personal
negative_comment: Die Dusche hat einen Mega glatten Boden Achtung geboten

title: teure, aber saubere Unterkunft in guter Lage
positive_comment: große Auswahl beim Frühstück; glutenfreies Gebäck erhalten; sauberes, sehr ruhiges Zimmer; Mini-Bar; Parkplatz direkt neben dem Hotel (kostenpflichtig!)
negative_comment: sehr unfreundlicher Empfang; falsche telefonische Auskunft bzgl. Parkplatzkosten; hoher Preis

title: Super tolles Zimmer Betten zum schlafen ein traum. Freundlichkeit  top.
positive_comment: Super Freundlich sauber tolle zimmer wir warn begeistert! Sehr zum weiter empfehlen. Wir kommen wieder.
negative_comment: Alles gepasst..

title: Hotel und die Lage Top !!
positive_comment: Wir waren das zweite mal im Hotel. Die Zimmer sind sehr schön und sauber. Die Betten angenehm. Das Frühstück war lecker der Kaffee sehr gut. Viel Auswahl von jedem etwas dabei. Das Personal super nett.
negative_comment: Uns wird der persönliche Kontakt mit Personal fehlen. Auch das gute Frühstück.

title: Stadtgenuss in Graz
positive_comment:
- Geräumiges Zimmer
- Gutes Frühstück
- Ideale Lage am Rande der Altstadt und für Ausflüge auf den Schlossberg

title: Schönes,ruhiges Zimmer an sehr guter Lage.
positive_comment: Neues stylisches und grosszügiges Zimmer. Alles hat funktioniert.
negative_comment: Rezeption könnte deutlich bessere Dienste leisten. Frische Eierspeisen wurden von einer Mitarbeiterin zubereitet, von einer anderen nicht (keine Zeit)?
